name: baseline_final
notes: v1=969.84 v2=975.62 v3=973.21 v4=973.27 ms/mol; equality stable run-to-run

name: translator_cleanup
description: hoist complete_seq_log_prob allocation; pre-transpose memory_bank once (avoid per-step .transpose+.contiguous); precompute memory_padding_mask; replace mask*x+~mask*y with torch.where
notes: primary translator-level win; pure refactor of attention setup

name: inference_mode
description: switch torch.no_grad to torch.inference_mode in translate_batch
notes: stacked on translator_cleanup; modest additional gain

name: decoder_src_pad_mask_hoist
description: skip per-step sequence_mask reconstruction in transformer_decoder.forward by accepting precomputed mask
notes: REVERTED in final stack: marginal gain (~0.2%), kept code simpler

name: persistent_mp_pool
description: replace per-call multiprocessing.Pool(4) with process-wide singleton pool
notes: rejected: introduces run-to-run nondeterminism in canonicalization (likely RDKit state in long-lived workers); not worth the equality risk

name: batch_size_16
description: increase batch size from 8 to 16 via config knob
notes: rejected: batch composition change perturbs SDPA reductions; prob delta ~2e-2

name: loc_batched_mm
description: concat all top-k rule LHS tensors into one mm + log_softmax + single CPU transfer
notes: rejected: cuBLAS picks different kernel for bigger GEMM; prob delta ~6e-5 just over rtol=1e-4

name: tf32_full
notes: rejected: TF32 reduces matmul precision; prob delta ~7e-4 > rtol; classic lossy speedup option

name: stacked_final
notes: kept stack: -31% (N=32 ensemble), -33% (N=500 ensemble); peak mem essentially unchanged

name: stacked_final
notes: transformer branch is the dominant cost; -34.7% latency
